avenues.name: Engineering layer — make today's machine better
avenues.thesis: AI decoders and below-threshold surface codes improve the qubits we already have, without changing what they're made of.

avenues.name: Designed qubits — search the hardware space
avenues.thesis: Let AI design the qubit's circuit or screen new materials and molecules: a different qubit, not a better-tuned one. An optimiser rediscovered fluxonium from a blank circuit.

avenues.name: Self-correcting matter — passive storage
avenues.thesis: Store a qubit in a material whose global structure resists noise on its own. A 3D self-correcting memory is claimed, but key stability and fabrication questions stay open.

avenues.name: The floor — a qubit that heals itself
avenues.thesis: Engineer the equation of motion so the qubit is a self-healing steady state. A from-first-principles cat-qubit simulation shows exponential noise bias; a Knill-Laflamme proof shows the four-component cat makes single-photon loss a correctable Z4 syndrome (k=4 minimal). Whether a search can discover such codes unaided is open.
avenues.signpost: first automated discovery of a loss-correcting bosonic code beyond the cat family, peer-reviewed and reproduced, by 2031

checks._comment: Single source of truth for the consistency-check RULES. Both index.html's console and verification/verify_numbers.py read these, so a threshold can never drift between the page and the verifier. Change a rule HERE and both sides enforce it on next run. (The check LOGIC is still written in each language — see AUTHORING.md — but the rules it enforces live only here.)
